title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:82416:run:20260404T214351:86053 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: - Failure mode 1: **Stale-memory override**. Sidecar retrieval returns outdated summaries that conflict with current `bootstrap receipt`/`runtime ledger`, and operators trust the sidecar answer first. - Mitigation 1: **Canonical-first resolution rule**. Enforce in code that sidecar data is advisory only; on conflict, always prefer `receipt/ledger/compact/health`, and log a conflict event. - Failure mode 2: **Authority creep / split-brain writes**. Narrow sidecar starts receiving state-like writes (phase/status/ownership), creating a second source of truth. - Mitigation 2: **Read-only sidecar contract**. Restrict sidecar to immutable memory documents with provenance (`run_id`, `artifact_path`, timestamp, TTL). Block any write that looks like runtime-state mutation. - Failure mode 3: **Recovery path coupling**. `doctor`/`recover-run` becomes dependent on sidecar availability; sidecar outage blocks recovery. - Mitigation 3: **Local-first, sidecar-optional fallback**. Keep recovery and health checks fully operable from local `compact + ledger + receipt`; sidecar retrieval is best-effort augmentation with timeout and hard fallback.
